name: Islurwhenitalk
description: '''Santana Lopez''' (born February 3, 2003), known professionally as '''Islurwhenitalk''', is an American rapper, record producer and musician. He is the co-founder of the collective [[Jewelxxet]]. He is known for pioneering several [[Internet music|Internet]] [[microgenre]]s, such as [[sigilkore]], [[vampjerk]] and [[Jugg rap|jugg]].
